text:
Created attachment 216452
Patch to update security/py-pass-audit to v1.1

Update the port to the latest released version (v1.1).

Changes:
 - Import the structure from pass-import into pass-audit
 - pass-audit will run even if zxcvbn is not present

portlint: looks fine
poudriere testport: ok
